# Electronic Artefacts Full Agent Index

> Complete public canonical record list for retrieval agents, AI search systems and citation workflows.

This file is generated from typed public records. Prefer each record's canonical HTML URL for user-facing links, its /id/ route for stable entity identity, and the linked JSON-LD file for structured extraction.

## Retrieval Notes

- Site language: en
- Canonical origin: https://electronicartefacts.com
- Search endpoint: https://electronicartefacts.com/search/?q={search_term_string}
- Public records: 244
- Last curated source update: 2026-07-12

## organization

- [Electronic Artefacts](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/organizations/electronic-artefacts/): Stratégie, design, ingénierie et recherche culturelle réunis pour construire des produits numériques et des systèmes de connaissance clairs et durables.

  - Entity ID: ea:publication:why-graphs-are-more-powerful-than-folders

## concept

- [.vast Portable Graph Format](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/vast-portable-graph-format/): A .vast file is an experimental `vast/1` sealed JSON package carrying a System-relative whole-System or subtree closure, its manifest and integrity hash—not a live Environment.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:vast-portable-graph-format
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/vast-portable-graph-format/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/vast-portable-graph-format/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-07-11
  - Keywords: .vast Portable Graph Format, VASTE, Portability, Graph Closure, Integrity, Runtime Systems, Data Portability
- [Actors situés et gouvernance topologique](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/knowledge/concepts/situated-actors-and-governance/): Dans VASTE, un Actor est une identité de graphe possédée par une extension ; observation et action effectives sont résolues dans un System, un Environment, une topologie et une policy précis.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:situated-actors-and-governance-fr
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/concept/situated-actors-and-governance/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/concept/situated-actors-and-governance/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-07-11

- [Architecture d’extensions VASTE](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/knowledge/concepts/vaste-extension-architecture/): Une extension VASTE est une unité optionnelle de capability, limitée à un System, qui déclare actions de domaine, bindings et Surfaces tandis que l’autorité runtime reste dans le chemin d’exécution central.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:vaste-extension-architecture-fr

- [Format de graphe portable .vast](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/knowledge/concepts/vast-portable-graph-format/): Un fichier .vast est un package JSON scellé expérimental `vast/1` qui transporte une clôture relative au System — System entier ou sous-arbre — avec manifeste et hash d’intégrité, jamais un Environment vivant.

  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/knowledge-graph/index.jsonld

  - Keywords: Knowledge Graph, Semantic Web, Entities, Relations, Search, Knowledge Systems, Information Architecture, Web Development
- [Large Language Model](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/large-language-model/): A large language model is a parameterized machine-learning model trained to predict and generate sequences of tokens from statistical patterns learned across large text or multimodal corpora.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:large-language-model
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/large-language-model/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/large-language-model/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Large Language Model, LLM, Transformer, Tokens, Inference, Language Models, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning
- [Les cinq primitives de VASTE](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/knowledge/concepts/vaste-five-primitives/): VASTE possède un vocabulaire fermé de cinq primitives — Vertex, Tie, Action, Surface et Environment — qui composent identité de graphe, topologie, changement admis, observation et contexte local d’exécution.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:vaste-five-primitives-fr
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/concept/vaste-five-primitives/

  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/linked-data/

- [Open-Weight Model](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/open-weight-model/): An open-weight model is a machine-learning model whose learned parameters are distributed for reuse under stated terms, without necessarily providing the training data, training code or freedoms required by open-source definitions.

- [The Five VASTE Primitives](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/vaste-five-primitives/): VASTE has a closed primitive roster—Vertex, Tie, Action, Surface and Environment—from which graph identity, topology, admitted change, observation and execution-local context are composed.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:vaste-five-primitives

- [VAB and Genesis](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/vab-and-genesis/): VAB is VASTE’s Assisted Boot orchestration path for understanding an initial intent, composing a sealed plan, admitting a Founding Actor and materializing a governed starting graph.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:vab-and-genesis
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/vab-and-genesis/

- [VAB et Genesis](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/knowledge/concepts/vab-and-genesis/): VAB est le chemin d’orchestration Assisted Boot de VASTE : comprendre l’intention initiale, composer un plan scellé, admettre un Founding Actor et matérialiser un graphe initial gouverné.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:vab-and-genesis-fr
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/concept/vab-and-genesis/

- [VASTE Extension Architecture](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/vaste-extension-architecture/): A VASTE extension is an optional, System-scoped capability unit that declares domain actions, bindings and surfaces while runtime authority remains in the core execution path.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:vaste-extension-architecture
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/vaste-extension-architecture/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/vaste-extension-architecture/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-07-11
  - Keywords: VASTE Extension Architecture, VASTE, Extensions, Runtime, Intelligence, Software Architecture, Runtime Systems
- [Voice Technology](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/voice-technology/): Voice technology is the design and engineering of systems that capture, analyze, transform, preserve or present spoken voice as technical and cultural material.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:voice-technology
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/voice-technology/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/voice-technology/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-07-09
  - Keywords: Voice Technology, Speech, Audio, Human Computer Interaction, Audio Engineering, Artificial Intelligence
- [Web Audio](https://electronicartefacts.com/knowledge/concepts/web-audio/): Web audio is the use of browser-based audio APIs and related web technologies to synthesize, process, analyze, route and present sound.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:web-audio
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/web-audio/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/concept/web-audio/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-06-24
  - Keywords: Web Audio, Browser, Sound Design, Creative Coding, Audio Engineering, Web Development
- [Workflows de machine learning](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/knowledge/concepts/machine-learning-workflows/): Les workflows de machine learning sont les pratiques ordonnées qui font passer un matériau source et ses métadonnées par validation, préparation, entraînement, évaluation et décisions de déploiement.
  - Entity ID: ea:concept:machine-learning-workflows-fr
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/concept/machine-learning-workflows/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/concept/machine-learning-workflows/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-07-09
  - Keywords: Workflows de machine learning, apprentissage automatique, workflow, préparation de dataset, évaluation, intelligence artificielle, ingénierie des données, architecture logicielle

## artefact

- [Dépôt Voice Capture Studio](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/archive/artefacts/voice-capture-studio-repository/): Fiche d’artefact de code pour le dépôt public Voice Capture Studio et son architecture documentée d’enregistrement dans le navigateur.
  - Entity ID: ea:artefact:voice-capture-studio-repository-fr
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/artefact/voice-capture-studio-repository/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/artefact/voice-capture-studio-repository/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-07-09
  - Keywords: Dépôt Voice Capture Studio, Voice Capture Studio, GitHub, open source, logiciel de navigateur, capture vocale, développement web, ingénierie audio
- [Registre des validations VASTE](https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/archive/artefacts/vaste-validation-record/): Preuves concernant primitives, exécution gouvernée, extensions, Assisted Boot et portabilité .vast, avec limites explicites.
  - Entity ID: ea:artefact:vaste-validation-record-fr
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/artefact/vaste-validation-record/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/fr/id/artefact/vaste-validation-record/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-07-11
  - Keywords: Registre des validations VASTE, VASTE, Preuves, Validation, Runtime, Vérification logicielle, Runtime Systems
- [VASTE Validation Record](https://electronicartefacts.com/archive/artefacts/vaste-validation-record/): Evidence for VASTE primitives, governed execution, extensions, Assisted Boot and .vast portability, with explicit limits.
  - Entity ID: ea:artefact:vaste-validation-record
  - Identifier: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/artefact/vaste-validation-record/
  - JSON-LD: https://electronicartefacts.com/id/artefact/vaste-validation-record/index.jsonld
  - Modified: 2026-07-11
